overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing Arthur Morgan running along a dirt wagon trail through a vast prairie landscape with rocky mesas and buttes. A horse-drawn wagon is visible ahead initially but moves out of view as the character continues along the winding path under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie wagon trail with distant rock mesas

agents.ego_description: Arthur Morgan running steadily along the dirt trail following a horse-drawn wagon in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon moving away along the trail ahead of the player

entered.detail: dusty dirt path with visible wagon wheel ruts running through the prairie
large flat-topped rock formation with layered sedimentary structure
prominent flat-topped mesa directly ahead on the horizon
rocky cliff formations and outcroppings on the right side of the trail
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Arthur Morgan running along a dusty wagon trail through an open prairie. A horse-drawn wagon is visible in the distance ahead, moving along the same path. Large rock mesas frame the landscape on both sides, with snow-capped mountains visible far in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving prairie trail with left mesa becoming prominent

events.description: trail begins curving gently to the right, following the terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the trail as the wagon disappears from view and the path curves

segments.scene_description: The wagon ahead has disappeared into the distance as the trail begins curving to the right. The right-side cliffs fall out of view while the left mesa grows larger and more detailed. The character continues running along the winding dirt path through the grassy prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail approaching large central mesa

agents.ego_description: running toward the large central rock formation as it dominates the forward view

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the open prairie with the large central mesa now looming prominently ahead. The left mesa has drawn much closer, filling the left side of the frame. The character maintains a steady running pace along the dirt path as the rock formations grow increasingly detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dusty wagon trail that transitions from a wide-open prairie vista into a more enclosed corridor of towering rock formations. It begins with Arthur Morgan running toward a distant horse-drawn wagon, framed by expansive mesas and far-off snow-capped mountains under a partly cloudy sky. As the trail curves to the right, the wagon disappears from view and the right-side cliffs recede, allowing the mesa on the left to grow larger and more detailed. The scene then shifts as the character maintains his pace along the winding dirt path, with the left mesa filling the frame and a massive central rock formation looming prominently ahead. Finally, the environment tightens around the runner as the surrounding rock formations become increasingly detailed and imposing.
